package rulefixtures

// scenario for hex_decode_string_in_loop: `hex.DecodeString(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario600Negative(decodedValues [][]byte) int {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range decodedValues {
		total += len(value)
	}
	return total
}
